failure_reason: Added the compiler/compiler-compiler body as high-level BML class/template source, with Form only as parser/proof infrastructure. Initial grammar validation exposed a missing close parenthesis in bml-source-class-supers-loop; fixed before proceeding. Initial source proof used high bit weights and overflowed; flattened it to a 42-check structural count. The final BML source proof returns 42 across Go/Rust/TypeScript and adjacent BML/BMF proofs remain green.
